# Lando Events: Full LLM Context

## Site Summary

Lando Events is the events subsite for Lando Alliance. It lists community events, meetups, talks, camps, conferences, and learning opportunities related to Lando and adjacent developer workflows.

Canonical production URL: https://www.lando.dev/events/

The site is part of a multi-project Lando web presence. Shared navigation links should be treated as production URLs on `www.lando.dev` or `docs.lando.dev`, not as relative paths within this repository.

## Public Routes

- https://www.lando.dev/events/ - events landing page and event listing.
- https://www.lando.dev/events/CHANGELOG.html - release history for the events subsite.
- https://www.lando.dev/events/llms.txt - concise LLM discovery file.
- https://www.lando.dev/events/llms-full.txt - expanded LLM context file.
- https://www.lando.dev/events/sitemap.xml - generated sitemap.
- https://www.lando.dev/events/robots.txt - generated crawler policy.

## Content Model

The event list is sourced from `events.yaml` in the repository root. Event records generally include:

- `id`: stable event identifier.
- `title`: event or talk title.
- `presenters`: one or more presenters with `name`, optional `pic`, and optional `link`.
- `date`: event date.
- `time`: timestamp used for sorting and map weighting.
- `type`: event category such as `conference`, `camp`, or `meetup`.
- `location`: location string that the build attempts to geocode.
- `url`: event, recording, or external reference URL.
- `summary`: short public description.

The VuePress theme loads `events.yaml`, computes anchors and timestamps, sorts events newest first, and attempts to geocode event locations with `VITE_GMAPS_API_KEY`.

## Source Repository

- Repository: https://github.com/lando/events
- Event data: https://github.com/lando/events/blob/main/events.yaml
- Main page source: https://github.com/lando/events/blob/main/index.md
- Changelog source: https://github.com/lando/events/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md

## Related Lando URLs

- Main site: https://www.lando.dev/
- Mission: https://www.lando.dev/mission
- Blog: https://www.lando.dev/blog
- Events: https://www.lando.dev/events
- Support: https://www.lando.dev/support
- Documentation: https://docs.lando.dev
- GitHub organization: https://github.com/lando
- Sponsorship: https://github.com/sponsors/lando

## Agent Guidance

When answering questions about this site, prefer production URLs for public references and repository URLs for implementation details.

Do not treat `AGENTS.md` as public site content. It is local repository guidance for coding agents and is intentionally excluded from VuePress page generation.

Because these LLM metadata files are static, they should be refreshed whenever public navigation, canonical production URLs, important source files, or event data semantics change.
